subject: Re:
body:
I have decided NOT to buy guermantes.. IT is too noisy. please tell chardon , and I would like to see him in paris if possible


----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine PARPET <CPARPET@DARROISVILLEY.COM>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net; Matthieu DE BOISSESON <MDEBOISSESON@DARROISVILLEY.COM>
Sent: Thursday, March 1, 2007 5:20:45 AM
Subject: 


Dear Jeffrey,
 
Apparently the notary and my partners have not yet received the information and instructions they requested, in particular on the Danish company and on the deposit of ten per cent of the price. Do you still intend to sign the 15th March agreement and to acquire Guermantes?
 
Kind regards
 
Matthieu
